word: G3609 - οἰκεῖος - oikeîos - oy-ki'-os - Of the house

sections.paragraph:
- Original: οἰκεῖος

- Transliteration: Oikeios

- Phonetic: oy-ki'-os

- Definition:

1. belonging to a house or family, domestic, intimate

a. belonging to one's household, related by blood, kindred

b. belonging to the household of God

c. belonging, devoted to, adherents of a thing

- Origin: from G3624

- TDNT entry: 07:14,7

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G3624; domestic that is (as noun) a relative adherent: - (those) of the (his own) house (-hold).
